javadoc_before: /** * {@link Sorter} implementation based on a variant of the quicksort algorithm called introsort: when the recursion level exceeds the * log of the length of the array to sort, it falls back to heapsort. This prevents quicksort from * running into its worst-case quadratic runtime. Small arrays are sorted with insertion sort. * * @lucene.internal */
javadoc_after:
/** * {@link Sorter} implementation based on a variant of the quicksort algorithm called introsort: when the recursion level exceeds the * log of the length of the array to sort, it falls back to heapsort. This prevents quicksort from * running into its worst-case quadratic runtime. Small ranges are sorted with insertion sort. * *

This sort algorithm is fast on most data shapes, especially with low cardinality. If the data * to sort is known to be strictly ascending or descending, prefer {@link TimSorter}. * * @lucene.internal */
